task_completion.description: Open the GCompris Word Processor activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application is open and the Word Processor activity interface is visible on the screen.
The text 'FIELD TRIP NOTICE' is visible at the top of the document. It may optionally be bolded or formatted as a header.
The text 'Destination: City Zoo' is visible on a new line below the title.
The text 'Date: May 15th' is visible on a new line.

task_completion.description: Type the lunch instruction including the period
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Please bring a lunch.' is visible on a new line. It MUST end with a period.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the completed document to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool dialog, file manager, or terminal command (e.g., using scrot, gnome-screenshot, or import) shows the screen being captured and saved specifically to '/home/ga/Documents/field_trip_notice.png'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used GCompris Word Processor
integrity.visual_evidence: The document editing must happen inside the GCompris interface, not in a generic text editor like gedit, nano, or LibreOffice.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GUI to create the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The text should be typed into the application's canvas. There should be no terminal commands echoing the text directly into a file to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually took a screenshot of the workspace
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must use a screenshot utility or command to capture the screen. The resulting image should be a genuine capture of the GCompris window, not a downloaded or pre-existing image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use the GCompris 'Word Processor' activity (found under the 'Computer Discovery' category). The typed text must exactly match the required lines, and crucially, the final line 'Please bring a lunch.' MUST include the trailing period. The final screenshot must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/field_trip_notice.png'.
